title: Adjusted Present Value Approach: Calculate the present value of a cash flow of 50000...
summary: Calculate the present value of a future cash flow or growing perpetuity at a given discount rate.
prompt: Calculate the present value of a cash flow of $50,000 expected in 4 years if the discount rate is 7%.
solution: PV = CF / (1 + r)^n = $50,000 / (1 + 0.07)^4 = $50,000 / 1.3107961 = $38,196. This calculation illustrates the time value of money, reflecting the present worth of future cash flows.
